summary: Update review surfaces to show family context. scripts/review_tags.py print_tag_row gains FAMILY: domain → family / — definition lines. Same for scripts/review_edges.py. Per design.md §9.

analysis.author: Hermes Agent
analysis.content:
review_tags.py: added FAMILY: domain → family / — gloss lines to print_tag_row exactly per §9 (id-style, via get_concept_family on the primary membership).

review_edges.py spec mismatch: edges are chunk↔chunk and carry NO concept, so the literal per-row 'FAMILY: domain → family' line from review_tags does not map. The meaningful analog is each linked chunk's *expressed* concept-families (via live EXPRESSES edges → primary memberships → families), which helps the reviewer judge whether a PARALLELS/CONTRASTS edge is thematically coherent. Data supports it (25,820 EXPRESSES edges, ~22 concepts/chunk). Implementing that as a FAMILIES(A)/FAMILIES(B) line in print_edge_row rather than forcing the tag-style single-concept line.

resolution.note: review_tags.print_tag_row shows the concept's primary family per §9; review_edges.print_edge_row shows each chunk's expressed concept-families (the sensible analog, since edges carry no concept). Display-only, 8 new tests + existing review tests green.
